en.Die Client-ID wird im BMW CarData Kunden: The client ID is generated in the BMW CarData customer portal (section 'API access' / 'CarData Client'). Required scopes: cardata:api:read and cardata:streaming:read.
en.Schritt 1: 'Login starten' klicken. Es e: Step 1: Click 'Start login'. A link + code appears. Open it in a browser and sign in with your BMW ID credentials. Step 2: Then click 'Complete login'.
en.BMW CarData liefert Werte nur für Telema: BMW CarData only returns values for telematic keys defined in a 'container'. Click 'Set up container' once - it automatically contains all relevant EV values.
en.Container-ID (optional, nur für manuelle: Container ID (optional, for manual assignment only)
en.ACHTUNG: BMW CarData erlaubt nur max. 50: NOTE: BMW CarData only allows max. 50 API calls per 24 hours. A 60-minute interval uses approx. 24 calls/day. Minimum interval of 30 minutes recommended.
en.Nicht angemeldet - bitte Login durchführ: Not logged in - please log in
en.Login läuft - bitte im Browser anmelden: Login in progress - please sign in via browser and complete login
en.Container fehlt - bitte 'Container einri: Container missing - please click 'Set up container'
en.Bitte zuerst die Client-ID eintragen und: Please enter the client ID first and click 'Apply'.
en.Bitte diese Adresse im Browser öffnen un: Please open this address in a browser and sign in with your BMW ID credentials:
en.Der Code ist %d Sekunden gültig. Danach: The code is valid for %d seconds. Then click 'Complete login'.
en.Die Anmeldung im Browser ist noch nicht: The browser login is not yet complete. Please sign in via the browser first, then click 'Complete login' again.
en.Anmeldung erfolgreich! Die Daten werden: Login successful! Data will now be retrieved regularly.
en.ACHTUNG: Der Scope \"cardata:api:read\": WARNING: The scope "cardata:api:read" is missing! The token is NOT authorized for the API. Please assign the "CarData API" permission to the client in the BMW CarData portal, wait 2-3 minutes, then run the login (step 1 + 2) again.
en.Der Scope \"cardata:api:read\" ist vorha: The scope "cardata:api:read" is present. Next, click "Set up container".
en.HINWEIS: Das Token ist nicht für die Car: NOTE: The token is not authorized for the CarData API. Possible causes:
en.1. Dem Client fehlt im BMW-Portal der Sc: 1. The client is missing the scope "cardata:api:read" in the BMW portal (subscribe to the "CarData API" section).
en.2. Die Berechtigung wurde erst NACH dem: 2. The permission was granted only AFTER logging in - then run the login (step 1 + 2) again.
en.3. BMW braucht einige Minuten, bis neue: 3. BMW needs a few minutes for new permissions to take effect - wait 2-3 minutes and try again.
en.Nicht angemeldet. Bitte zuerst den Login: Not logged in. Please complete the login first.
This ID has been saved automatically. Manual entry is not necessary.
